root: Release surfaces are generated from the live catalog: README, README.zh-CN, VitePress docs, public Markdown, AGENTS.md, and the AI-readable docs now agree on 268 sites, 1616 commands, 1113 adapters, 101 pipeline steps, and 8188 tests.
The README entry path is rebuilt around fast install, intent search, machine-readable execution, MCP serving, and a generated logo-backed coverage wall with no placeholder badges.
Release metadata now stays synchronized across package manifests, server registry metadata, skills, docs, public Markdown, and the generated catalog assets.
Archived-command checks now use command-boundary matching so active commands such as `ctrip hotel-suggest` do not mask real archive leaks or trigger false positives.
zh: README、README.zh-CN、VitePress 文档、public Markdown、AGENTS.md 和 Agent 可读文档都从真实目录生成，统一显示 268 个站点、1616 条命令、1113 个适配器、101 个 pipeline step、8188 个测试。
README 入口重写为安装、意图搜索、机器可读执行、MCP 服务和真实 logo 覆盖墙，去掉占位 badge 噪音。
发布 metadata 已同步到 package manifest、server registry metadata、skills、docs、public Markdown 和生成目录资产。
归档命令检查改为命令边界匹配，避免 `ctrip hotel-suggest` 这类 active command 误触发，也不会掩盖真实 archive 泄漏。
